name: sa-get-ad-tier-package
description: Returns Seek branded ad budget package details for Occasional (2–3 ads), Regular (4–6 ads), or Frequent (6–10 ads) hiring tiers. Pass tier and/or adCount; validates ad count against tier rules and returns budget, discounts, eligible ad types, and summary text.

tier.description: Hiring tier: occasional, regular, or frequent. Aliases: hiringTier, adTier, packageTier.

adCount.description: Number of job ads (2–10). Maps to tier when tier omitted: 2–3 occasional, 4–6 regular, 6–10 frequent. Aliases: numberOfAds, jobAdCount, ads.

seekId.description: Optional. 6-character Seek PIN to attach advertiser context.

listTiers.description: If true, returns all tier options without package detail.
